title: Plugins
description: A slide introducing Plugins as the packaging layer that bundles the entire stack into a single installable unit. Two sub-concepts are presented: the plugin bundle structure and the plugin marketplace.

parts.title: Plugin Bundle
parts.description: A box diagram labeled 'Plugin' containing four nested component icons: Skills, Hooks, Agents, MCP Server Config. An arrow points from the box to a project directory, labeled with a single install command. A caption reads: 'The full stack in a box. One command drops a complete workflow into any project.'

parts.title: Marketplace
parts.description: A grid of plugin cards styled like an app store. Each card shows a plugin name, a category tag (Next.js, Notion, GitHub, Slack), a version number, and an install button. Two sections are visible: Community Plugins and Private Registry. A caption reads: 'Build once, share everywhere.'
